name: Gingr Pet Care Business API
what_it_does: Gingr REST API for pet care business management platform. Enables AI agents to manage pet and owner profiles, book boarding and daycare reservations, schedule grooming appointments, process payments and deposits, track vaccination records and health notes, manage staff scheduling, and integrate pet care data with marketing and communication systems.
use_cases: Managing pet profiles and owner information from pet care operations agents
Booking boarding and grooming appointments from reservation management agents
Tracking vaccination records and health requirements from compliance management agents
Processing payments and managing deposits from billing automation agents
not_for: Veterinary clinical practice without boarding/grooming service management
Pet retail without service booking and care scheduling
Large commercial kennel chains with enterprise-grade multi-location management needs
best_when: A dog boarding, doggy daycare, grooming, or pet care facility using Gingr wants AI agents to automate reservation management, pet intake, owner communication, and payment processing.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Pet owner personal data and pet health records require careful handling. Vaccination requirement compliance varies by state and facility regulations.

auth.notes: Gingr uses API key and OAuth 2.0 for API access. Business-level credentials per location. Partner program for third-party integrations. API documentation available to registered developers.

pricing.paid_tiers: Monthly per-location pricing; Pro and Enterprise tiers
pricing.notes: Boulder, Colorado company, founded 2014. Cloud-based pet care platform with 2,000+ facilities. Strong dog boarding and grooming focus. Marketplace for owner booking in addition to business tools.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Pet owner personal data and pet health records require careful handling
No public MCP server — REST API with API key or OAuth2
No granular scopes — OAuth may grant broad facility access
Vaccination compliance requirements vary by facility and state regulations
Smaller developer ecosystem than enterprise platforms — limited community support
agent_readiness.security_notes: Pet owner personal and health data. PCI-DSS. API key and OAuth2. US data residency only. Vaccination compliance data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Pet owner and animal health data. PCI-DSS. API key and OAuth2. US data residency only.
